title: Entity Schema Mapping
description: Detailed column-level mapping from source SQL staging tables to Dataverse entity attributes

sections.name: Entity List
sections.description: Identify all entities to map by cross-referencing staging tables with Dataverse schema

gather.instruction: Extract all entities with alm_ prefix: {logicalName, entitySetName, attributes (as array)}
List all staging table names that contain 'alm' in their name

criteria.description: Summary table linking DV entities to their staging tables and transform SPs
Every staging table with 'alm' in the name is matched to a DV entity, or marked as 'orphan' with explanation

sections.name: Column Mapping: {entity}
sections.description: Detailed column-to-attribute mapping for {entity}, including data types, transforms, and unmapped fields

gather.instruction: Extract all column definitions: {name, dataType, nullable, defaultValue}
Extract all attributes: {logicalName, attributeType, requiredLevel, displayName}
Extract column mappings from SELECT statements: which staging columns map to which output columns, any CASE/transform logic

criteria.description: Mapping table with staging source, DV target, types, any transform logic, and notes
Every column from the staging table DDL appears in the mapping table, either mapped to a DV attribute or marked as 'unmapped' with explanation
Every required (not nullable) DV attribute has a mapped staging column or a documented default/derivation
